sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111120" key="filo/dendros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-δενδρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111120.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of trees</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the wood,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.233</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theaet.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
